text: Led a 4-member team as Web Developer to build the Effervescence event site.
title: Effervescence
description: Led a 4-member team as Web Developer to build the Effervescence event site.
highlights: Led a 4-member web development team for the campus event.
Built and shipped the full event website end to end.

text: Built 2 dedicated websites for the Aparoksha event for registrations and to enhance user engagement.
title: Aparoksha
description: Built 2 dedicated websites for the event for registrations and to enhance user engagement.
highlights: Delivered separate registration and engagement-focused event sites.
Improved sign-up flow and on-site user engagement for attendees.

text: Taught underprivileged students through Prayaas, IIIT-A's community outreach NGO.
title: Prayaas
description: Volunteered with Prayaas, the IIIT Allahabad NGO, teaching underprivileged students in nearby communities.
highlights: Conducted regular teaching sessions for students from underserved backgrounds.
Supported academic learning and mentorship through the Prayaas outreach program.
